EmailTemplate.description: Warning letter with life limit threshold is within reach
EmailTemplate.name: Life Limit Threshold Warning
EmailTemplate.subject: Reminder: Life Limit Threshold Approaching On Assembly {!leaseworks__Utilization_Report_List_Item__c.leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c}
EmailTemplate.textOnly: The life limit on your {!leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c.leaseworks__Type__c} is {!leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c.leaseworks__Life_Limit__c}. You are withing 10% of this. Please schedule a shop visit.
